segments.text: Thank you for meeting us today.
Um, I just put an apology in for our board chair.
Um, unfortunately she couldn't travel
and couldn't be with us here today.
Um, so this year, crown Infrastructure Delivery CID,
has made significant progress, um, in transitioning from,
um, the Christchurch focus organization
of delivering the Nanka projects,
following their Christchurch Earthquakes to a national, uh,
agency supporting crown entities
with their planning delivery,
and managing their critical
infrastructure across New Zealand.
Um, having completed, um, close to $1.1 billion of projects,
mainly in Christchurch.
Uh, CID now manages a diverse public sector portfolio
nationwide, uh,
addressing challenges like fragmented capability,
limited capacity, uh, duplicated effort,
and limited transparency.
Uh, we are recognized as a trusted, uh, agency,
excelling in all aspects of infrastructure delivery.
We support agencies through the entire
infrastructure lifecycle.
It includes planning and business case development, uh,
right through to asset management
and operational oversight, as well as our, um,
day-to-day bread and butter delivery
and management of infrastructure projects.
We are actively exploring broader opportunities, uh,
to support agencies where our expertise can strengthen, uh,
delivery capability and help lift performance across the
infrastructure system in the country.
We see real, uh, real system-wide value
and concentrated infrastructure expertise within an
agency like CID.
Uh, what what we see is that, um,
project Governors are supported with better data for, um,
for decision making, and we have, um, consistent proce, um,
consistent processes and,
and we provide stronger oversight in those
projects that we deliver.
By June, 2025,
we had $1.25 billion worth of projects underway.
Uh, we supported 12 clients across client agencies across 18
sites nationwide.
Our projects include the complex, uh, seismic upgrade
and end of life service replacement
at the Auckland District Court.
That building needs to remain operational while we
undertake our work there.
Uh, we're also supporting the building of the science center
at Kenna per for public health and forensic science,
and we're doing the design
and construction of the new biosecurity facility for NPI,
biosecurity New Zealand and Auckland.
In the first five months of this financial year,
we signed seven new cost recovery fee for service, uh,
agreements with new clients.
Uh, those new clients include Health New Zealand
for their rapid inpatient capacity extension program,
ministry for social of social development for business case
and governance support for their program,
developing facilities to cater
for intellectually disabled people who commit serious crime
and the New Zealand police
as they developed their property program, uh, business case.
Um, we're also really proud to have handed over Pat Kiri,
the recreation sports facility in Christchurch.
It's the last, the last of anchor projects in Christchurch,
and that's, uh, uh, we handed that
to Christchurch City Council at the end of October.
Uh, CID is now engaging with councils
and local government organizations to offer our support
and services, uh,
to help them manage their infrastructure needs effectively.
And we've recently began work with a little port company
for feasibility on a new office building,
and that's on top of the work that we're doing
with the Chatham Island Council, with their, um,
emergency services or,
and co-location of government services hub on the island.
Our mission is to build and maintain adaptable,
sustainable infrastructure for New Zealand.
We have high level of expertise and experience in this area,
and we have excellent systems and processes.
Our plan going forward is to work in partnership
with our client agencies, um, both in central
and local government, and to make a positive
and lasting difference
to New Zealand infrastructure system as the introduction.
Thanks for having us, and, um,
welcome with questions. Thank you
Very much. Right. Throwing up
